info.title: TextIt API
info.description: TextIt API v2 for managing messaging workflows including contacts, messages, flows, campaigns, channels, broadcasts, groups, labels, and more. All endpoints require token-based authentication via the Authorization header.

get.description: Returns contacts ordered by last modified date.

post.description: Use query parameters uuid or urn to update an existing contact. Without query params, creates a new contact.

post.summary: Send a message to a contact
post.description: Send a message to a contact

RateLimited.description: Rate limit exceeded. Check Retry-After header.
